comments: Approved. The execution contract complies with the M3 planning approval constraints. allowed_files is strictly limited to only src/mcp-server/src/index.ts. Workflow artifacts are correctly segregated into allowed_artifacts, with execution-result and review-packet outputs excluded from allowed_files. out_of_scope explicitly bans workflow mutation, auto-approval logic, reviewer identity redesign, artifact discovery expansion beyond dispatch.json, and protocol evolution topics. The contract also includes stop_conditions reinforcing source/artifact boundaries and prohibiting execution before an independent contract review decision, which is consistent with the approval directives.
